buttonText:
🆕 Story Pack 1: Mad Ellie and the Vault of the Damned 🔫 + New Vault Hunter C4SH
Launches: March 26, 2026 : Updated: 3/19/2026 : 6:03pm
descriptionText:
🆕 ICYMI : Story Pack 1: Mad Ellie and the Vault of the Damned is the first major paid DLC for Borderlands 4, launching on March 26. It introduces a brand-new Vault Hunter, C4SH, and a cosmic-horror themed story campaign set in a new zone, The Whispering Glacier. This first Story Pack addition to Borderlands 4 features the most amount of new content in a Borderlands 4 DLC so far.




New Vault Hunter: C4SH the Rogue :
  • New Vault Hunter: C4SH is a CasinoBot whose new lease on life came from winning a high-stakes card game, giving him a magical deck that imbues him with eldritch boons.
  • Gameplay: His playstyle revolves around taking risks and bending luck in your favor. This drives him to play nothing safe, always bet on himself, and take as many risks as possible.
  • Action Skills: The power fantasy of C4SH's Rogue class is all about going for broke as a devil-may-care gambler. One of C4SH's unique Action Skills is 'Sleight of Hand,' where he draws cards from a randomized deck to unleash powerful spells.
  • Availability: C4SH is playable across all base game and DLC zones.



Story & Zone Details:
  • Story: Team up with Ellie, Moxxi's daughter, to journey across The Whispering Glacier on a quest to destroy an alien monolith and enter the accursed Vault of the Damned.
  • Zone: The Whispering Glacier is an all-new region of Kairos. It is an icy expanse filled with derelict ships where colossal shards of Eridium pierce through the ground, and the atmosphere is choked by perpetually stormy weather. You might bear witness to gruesome sights like rivers of blood and gargantuan growths of pulsating flesh.
  • Returning Characters: Fans will reunite with characters like Mancubus Bloodtooth, Pickle, and Crazy Earl.
  • Accessing DLC: To start, complete the 'A Lot to Process' mission in the Fadefields. Alternatively, players can start a new character at level 13 and jump straight into the DLC content.






New Content & Loot:
  • Enemies: Prepare to face new threats, including grizzled soldiers of the DAHL Legion, as well as familiar Kraggons and Scavs from Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel. The DLC features two new major boss fights and 16 new minibosses.
  • Loot: Story Pack 1 adds a large amount of new gear, including:
    • 3 Pearlescent Weapons
    • 18 Legendary Items (including 2 Grenades, 2 Heavy Weapons, 2 Shields, and 5 Class Mods)
  • Cosmetics: A total of 28 new cosmetics for all Vault Hunters and C4SH. The breakdown includes:
    • 2 Vault Hunter Heads usable by all Vault Hunters
    • 4 Vault Hunter Skins usable by all Vault Hunters
    • 8 Vault Hunter Heads usable by C4SH
    • 2 Vault Hunter Bodies usable by C4SH (base + alternate)
    • 4 Weapon Skins
    • 4 Vehicle Skins
    • 3 ECHO-4 Drone Skins & Attachments
    • 1 ECHO-4 Frame




Major Update - Shared Progression:
  • New Feature: A major update released alongside Story Pack 1 introduces shared progression for new characters.
  • Shared Elements: New characters on the same account will gain access to map progression, SDU tokens, Hover Drives, cosmetic rewards, and activity progression.
  • Level Cap Increase: The maximum level for all Vault Hunters has been increased from 50 to 60.

Acquiring Story Pack 1:
  • New Players: Purchase Borderlands 4 Super Deluxe Edition, which contains Story Pack 1 and 2, the Ornate Order Pack, and Bounty Packs 2-5.
  • Existing Players: Option 1: Purchase the Vault Hunter Pack that includes Story Packs 1 and 2 plus the Ornate Order Pack. Option 2: Purchase Story Pack 1 individually.

customButtons.buttonText:
🔫 Free Raid Boss : Bloomreaper the Invincible 🔫 + More
Dropped/Dropps : December 11, 2025 : Updated 12/12/2025 : 1:03am
customButtons.descriptionText:
🆕 ICYMI : Bloomreaper is a brand-new raid boss coming to Borderlands 4. Alongside it, there will also be a UVHM (Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode) increase, bringing a new challenge for players to dive into.

Bloomreaper :
  • invincibles: If you are familiar with 'invincibles' from the older games in the series, this will certainly ring a bell.
  • will be the first endgame raid boss in Borderlands 4. While the name invincible may seem impossible to kill, know that they will be killable, but not easy. Here's what you can expect:
    - Massive Health Pools
    - Extremely Lethal Attack Damage
    - New Modifiers

Tips For Fighting : Bloomreaper :
  • Vile: Splash Damage
  • Flesh: Incendairy Damage

Drops From Bloomreaper : 5 dedicated legendary items
  • Will Update: Once I see whats dropping, So please give me a few : (will update with images or stat/gun links
  • [Rainmaker - Ripper Sniper Rifle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsmashx88x/-xsmashx88x/main/Weekly%20Weapons/rainmaker_sniper_bloom.png) | Irrigation: Chance on bullet fired to not consume any ammo. (guaranteed drop for Platinum-tier rewards in UVHM)
  • [Mantra - Maliwan Shotgun](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsmashx88x/-xsmashx88x/main/Weekly%20Weapons/mantra-sg_bloom.png) | Chakra: Deals melee damage.
  • [Undershield - Vladof Shield Armor Shield](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsmashx88x/-xsmashx88x/main/Weekly%20Weapons/Undershield-armor_bloom.png) | Exoskeleton: On Armor segment break, grants Overshield.
  • [Urchin - Tediore Ordnance (Grenade)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsmashx88x/-xsmashx88x/main/Weekly%20Weapons/urchin-nade_boom.png) | Snaboopie-pop: Explodes in a large area with shrapnel ricochets.
  • [Jett-Setter - Ripper Ordnance (Heavy Weapon)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsmashx88x/-xsmashx88x/main/Weekly%20Weapons/Jett-Setter-heavywp_bloom.png) | Frequent Flyer: Fires 3 projectiles that split on impact, spawning explosive bombs
  • [Misericorde - Siren Class Mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsmashx88x/-xsmashx88x/main/Weekly%20Weapons/Misericorde_Siren_clssmod.png) | Phase Daggers gain a chance to Ricochet. Critical Hits grants a stack of Misery for a duration, increasing Skill Damage. Misery can stack up to 50 times. (can only drop for Silver-tier or higher rewards in UVHM)
  • [Overdriver - Exo-Soldier Class Mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsmashx88x/-xsmashx88x/main/Weekly%20Weapons/Overdriver_Exo_class.png) | Rafa deals increased Ordnance and Gun Damage the faster he moves. While overdrive is avtive, the bonus is doubled. (can only drop for Silver-tier or higher rewards in UVHM)
  • [Trooper - Gravitar Class Mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsmashx88x/-xsmashx88x/main/Weekly%20Weapons/Trooper_gravitar_Harlowe_classmod.png) | Critical Hits with Guns partially restore Ordnance Cooldown. On Ordnance Activation, gain Gun Damage and Action Skill Damage for a Duration. (can only drop for Silver-tier or higher rewards in UVHM)
  • [Lamplighter - Forgeknight Class Mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsmashx88x/-xsmashx88x/main/Weekly%20Weapons/Lamplighter_Amon_class.png) | Whenever Amon Critically Hits with Guns, he partially restores Action Skill Duration. While Action Skill is active, he gains increase Gun and Melee Damage every second until Action Skill ends. (can only drop for Silver-tier or higher rewards in UVHM)

True Mode :
  • Dev Note: We wanted to provide a greater challenge to players who have spent the time to perfect their mightiest builds. True Mode scales up all enemies as if you were playing in a 4-player party, regardless of your current party size. That means your opponents will be tougher to take down, far more numerous, and have more Badass elites among their ranks. True Mode is found in the Session Settings menu and works independently of Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode, allowing Vault Hunters to have the most control over their difficulty.
  • Added support for True Mode, a new difficulty that is always scaled for a party of 4 regardless of the amount of players. The change here ups that balance to provide a greater challenge to those who are ready to take it on. This new difficulty mode is available when a player has completed the campaign.

Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode 6 It is time for a greater challenge:
  • Added support for UVHM 6
  • Added new UVHM challenge
  • Added new Firmware: Skillcraft, only available in UVHM 6
Skillcraft tiers make your Action Skills even more dangerous to your enemies.
  • Tier 1: Skill Damage +10%
  • Tier 2: Skill Critical Chance +10%
  • Tier 3: Dealing Skill Damage increases Skill Damage Dealt by 2% for 10 seconds. Max 25 Stacks.

customButtons.buttonText:
❄️How Rush Saved Mercenary Day❄️
Bounty Pack 1 | Dropped : November 20, 2025
customButtons.descriptionText:
🆕 ICYMI : Anyone who purchased the Deluxe Edition, Super Deluxe Edition, or Bounty Pack Bundle will receive a new, fifth Bounty Pack in 2026 at no additional cost.

Type Of Content : Paid DLC Given Free |Will update as more info,images come out

Narrative content :
  • Story: Players help Rush organize a 'Mercenary Day' celebration on Chyros, which is opposed by Minister Screw, the holiday-hating Minister of Culture.
  • Content: Includes new main missions, enemies, and legendary loot.

Vault Card rewards :
  • Vault Card: A permanent, non-expiring card that provides rewards through completing daily and weekly challenges..
  • Loot: 24 cosmetics to unlock and four pieces of rerollable gear
    4 re-rollable weapons
    4 Vault Hunter Heads
    4 Vault Hunter Skins
    5 Weapon Skins
    5 Vehicle Skins
    4 ECHO-4 Drone Skins
    2 ECHO-4 Attachments

Other earnable content :
  • DigiRunner: A new vehicle for the in-game mode.
  • Vault Hunter Skin: A new cosmetic skin for a Vault Hunter.
  • ECHO-4 Skin: A new cosmetic skin for the ECHO-4 drone.
